output.answer: Half-Life 2: Episode Two was released on October 10, 2007.
output.formatted:
Half-Life 2: Episode Two was released on October 10, 2007.

SPARQL query over wikidata:
```sparql
PREFIX wdt: <http://www.wikidata.org/prop/direct/>
PREFIX wd: <http://www.wikidata.org/entity/>
SELECT ?releaseDate WHERE {
  wd:Q553308 wdt:P577 ?releaseDate
}
```

Execution result:
Got 4 rows and 1 column:
| releaseDate                         |
| ----------------------------------- |
| 2007-10-10T00:00:00Z (xsd:dateTime) |
| 2007-12-14T00:00:00Z (xsd:dateTime) |
| 2010-05-26T00:00:00Z (xsd:dateTime) |
| 2013-05-10T00:00:00Z (xsd:dateTime) |
